a: This is the structure that the `ABActionRegisterCallbacks` returns to tell Address Book about the action the plug-in implements.
The title of the menu item for the action.
Implement an Address Book action plug-in to support the display of rollover menus on top of custom items.

Return `true` ifthe action menu item should be enabled, `false` otherwise.If the property returned by `ABActionGetPropertyCallback` isa multi-value property, `identifier` contains theunique identifier of the value selected.
Return the property the action applies to.

Execute the action. If the property returnedby [ABActionGetPropertyCallback](/documentation/addressbook/abactiongetpropertycallback) isa multi-value property, `identifier` containsthe unique identifier of the value selected; otherwise, identifieris `NULL`.
